name: Bloated one
description: Swollen and slow, no trouble to hit. The trouble is the killing: it ruptures where it falls, and you are standing right there.
notes: T46 · mirrors the engine ENEMIES table (combat.ts). burstInfection 40: putting it down at your node — melee or firearm — inflicts a bite-severity infectious wound (wound.bite) that drives the T22 infection track. The lesson is to slip past, not to kill it in your face. Keyed to zombie.bloated.
